subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Blessed is this moment, precious is this day, and exalted is this hour when the True One, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی مبارکست این حین و محبوبست این یوم و عزیز است این وقت که حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
